48:     private static void transformFile(Path file) {
49:         try {
50:             CompilationUnit cu = StaticJavaParser.parse(file);
51:             AtomicBoolean changed = new AtomicBoolean(false);
52: 
53:             rewriteImports(cu, changed);
54: 
55:             cu.findAll(ObjectCreationExpr.class)
56:                 .forEach(
57:                     expr -> {
58:                         if (isTargetPnConfigurationCreation(expr) && expr.getArguments().isEmpty()) {

60:                             expr.setArguments(NodeList.nodeList(uuidExpr));
61:                             changed.set(true);
62:                         }
63:                     });
64: 
65:             cu.findAll(MethodDeclaration.class)
66:                 .forEach(
67:                     method -> {
68:                         if (renameSubscribeCallbackMethod(method)) {
69:                             changed.set(true);
70:                         }
71:                     });
72: 
73:             cu.findAll(ObjectCreationExpr.class)
74:                 .forEach(
75:                     expr -> {
76:                         if (ensureFileCallbackExists(expr)) {
77:                             changed.set(true);
78:                         }
79:                     });
80: 
81:             cu.findAll(ClassOrInterfaceDeclaration.class)
82:                 .forEach(
83:                     declaration -> {
84:                         if (ensureFileCallbackExists(declaration)) {
85:                             changed.set(true);
86:                         }
87:                     });
88: 
89:             if (changed.get()) {
90:                 Files.writeString(file, cu.toString(), StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
91:             }

94:         }

98:         cu.getImports()
99:             .forEach(
100:                 imp -> {
101:                     String name = imp.getNameAsString();
102:                     if (OLD_USER_RESULT_FQN.equals(name)) {
103:                         imp.setName(NEW_UUID_RESULT_FQN);
104:                         changed.set(true);
105:                     } else if (OLD_SPACE_RESULT_FQN.equals(name)) {
106:                         imp.setName(NEW_CHANNEL_RESULT_FQN);
107:                         changed.set(true);
108:                     } else if (OLD_MEMBERSHIP_RESULT_FQN.equals(name)) {
109:                         imp.setName(NEW_MEMBERSHIP_RESULT_FQN);
110:                         changed.set(true);
111:                     }
112:                 });
113:     }

115:     private static boolean isTargetPnConfigurationCreation(ObjectCreationExpr expr) {
116:         String typeName = expr.getType().getNameAsString();
117:         String typeString = expr.getType().asString();
118:         return PN_CONFIGURATION_FQN.equals(typeString) || "PNConfiguration".equals(typeName);

121:     private static boolean renameSubscribeCallbackMethod(MethodDeclaration method) {
122:         if (method.getParameters().size() != 2) {
123:             return false;
124:         }
125: 
126:         String methodName = method.getNameAsString();
127:         String secondType = method.getParameter(1).getType().asString();
128:         if ("user".equals(methodName) && matchesType(secondType, "PNUserResult", OLD_USER_RESULT_FQN)) {
129:             method.setName("uuid");
130:             method.getParameter(1).setType(NEW_UUID_RESULT_FQN);
131:             return true;
132:         }
133:         if ("space".equals(methodName) && matchesType(secondType, "PNSpaceResult", OLD_SPACE_RESULT_FQN)) {
134:             method.setName("channel");
135:             method.getParameter(1).setType(NEW_CHANNEL_RESULT_FQN);
136:             return true;
137:         }
138:         if ("membership".equals(methodName) && matchesType(secondType, "PNMembershipResult", OLD_MEMBERSHIP_RESULT_FQN)) {
139:             method.getParameter(1).setType(NEW_MEMBERSHIP_RESULT_FQN);
140:             return true;
141:         }
142:         return false;
143:     }

145:     private static boolean ensureFileCallbackExists(ObjectCreationExpr expr) {
146:         if (expr.getAnonymousClassBody().isEmpty()) {
147:             return false;
148:         }
149: 
150:         boolean isSubscribeCallback =
151:             SUBSCRIBE_CALLBACK_FQN.equals(expr.getType().asString()) || SUBSCRIBE_CALLBACK_FQN.equals(expr.getType().getNameAsString());
152:         if (!isSubscribeCallback) {

154:         }
155: 
156:         NodeList<BodyDeclaration<?>> body = expr.getAnonymousClassBody().get();
157:         boolean alreadyHasFile =
158:             body.stream()
159:                 .filter(MethodDeclaration.class::isInstance)
160:                 .map(MethodDeclaration.class::cast)
161:                 .anyMatch(m -> m.getNameAsString().equals("file") && m.getParameters().size() == 2 && matchesType(m.getParameter(1).getType().asString(), "PNFileEventResult", FILE_RESULT_FQN));
162:         if (alreadyHasFile) {

167:         return true;

170:     private static boolean ensureFileCallbackExists(ClassOrInterfaceDeclaration declaration) {
171:         boolean extendsSubscribeCallback =
172:             declaration.getExtendedTypes().stream()
173:                 .anyMatch(type -> SUBSCRIBE_CALLBACK_FQN.equals(type.getNameAsString()) || SUBSCRIBE_CALLBACK_FQN.equals(type.asString()));
174:         if (!extendsSubscribeCallback && !declaration.getImplementedTypes().stream()
175:             .anyMatch(type -> SUBSCRIBE_CALLBACK_FQN.equals(type.getNameAsString()) || SUBSCRIBE_CALLBACK_FQN.equals(type.asString()))) {
176:             return false;
177:         }
178: 
179:         boolean alreadyHasFile =

181:                 .anyMatch(m -> m.getParameters().size() == 2 && matchesType(m.getParameter(1).getType().asString(), "PNFileEventResult", FILE_RESULT_FQN));
182:         if (alreadyHasFile) {
183:             return false;
184:         }
185: 
186:         String fileMethod =
187:             "@Override public void file(" + PUBNUB_FQN + " pubnub, " + FILE_RESULT_FQN + " pnFileEventResult) {}";
188:         MethodDeclaration method = StaticJavaParser.parseBodyDeclaration(fileMethod).asMethodDeclaration();
189:         declaration.addMember(method);
190:         return true;
191:     }

193:     private static boolean matchesType(String actual, String simpleName, String fqn) {
194:         return simpleName.equals(actual) || fqn.equals(actual) || actual.endsWith("." + simpleName);

116:                     } else if (OLD_SPACE_RESULT_FQN.equals(name)) {
117:                         imp.setName(NEW_CHANNEL_RESULT_FQN);
118:                         changed.set(true);
119:                     } else if (OLD_MEMBERSHIP_RESULT_FQN.equals(name)) {
120:                         imp.setName(NEW_MEMBERSHIP_RESULT_FQN);
121:                         changed.set(true);
122:                     }
123:                 });
124:     }
125: 
126:     private static boolean isTargetPnConfigurationCreation(ObjectCreationExpr expr) {
127:         String typeName = expr.getType().getNameAsString();
128:         String typeString = expr.getType().asString();
129:         return PN_CONFIGURATION_FQN.equals(typeString) || "PNConfiguration".equals(typeName);
130:     }
131: 
132:     private static boolean rewriteCheckedPnConfigurationDeclaration(VariableDeclarationExpr declaration) {
133:         if (declaration.getVariables().size() != 1) {
134:             return false;
135:         }
136: 
137:         VariableDeclarator variable = declaration.getVariable(0);
138:         if (!variable.getInitializer().isPresent() || !variable.getInitializer().get().isObjectCreationExpr()) {
139:             return false;
140:         }
141: 
142:         ObjectCreationExpr init = variable.getInitializer().get().asObjectCreationExpr();
143:         if (!isTargetPnConfigurationCreation(init) || !init.getArguments().isEmpty()) {
144:             return false;
145:         }
146: 
147:         if (!(declaration.getParentNode().orElse(null) instanceof ExpressionStmt)) {
148:             return false;
149:         }
150:         ExpressionStmt statement = (ExpressionStmt) declaration.getParentNode().orElse(null);
151:         if (!(statement.getParentNode().orElse(null) instanceof BlockStmt)) {
152:             return false;
153:         }
154:         BlockStmt block = (BlockStmt) statement.getParentNode().orElse(null);
155: 
156:         Statement declarationStmt = StaticJavaParser.parseStatement(variable.getType() + " " + variable.getNameAsString() + ";");
157:         Statement tryStmt = StaticJavaParser.parseStatement(
158:             "try { "
159:                 + variable.getNameAsString()
160:                 + " = new "
161:                 + USER_ID_FQN
162:                 + "(" 
163:                 + UUID_FACTORY_EXPRESSION
164:                 + "); } catch (com.pubnub.api.PubNubException e) { throw new RuntimeException(e); }");
165: 
166:         int index = block.getStatements().indexOf(statement);
167:         block.getStatements().remove(index);
168:         block.addStatement(index, declarationStmt);
169:         block.addStatement(index + 1, tryStmt);
170:         return true;
171:     }
172: 
173:     private static boolean renameSubscribeCallbackMethod(MethodDeclaration method) {
174:         if (method.getParameters().size() != 2) {
175:             return false;
176:         }
177: 
178:         String methodName = method.getNameAsString();
179:         String secondType = method.getParameter(1).getType().asString();
180:         if ("user".equals(methodName) && matchesType(secondType, "PNUserResult", OLD_USER_RESULT_FQN)) {
181:             method.setName("uuid");
182:             method.getParameter(1).setType(NEW_UUID_RESULT_FQN);
183:             return true;
184:         }
185:         if ("space".equals(methodName) && matchesType(secondType, "PNSpaceResult", OLD_SPACE_RESULT_FQN)) {
186:             method.setName("channel");
187:             method.getParameter(1).setType(NEW_CHANNEL_RESULT_FQN);
188:             return true;
189:         }
190:         if ("membership".equals(methodName) && matchesType(secondType, "PNMembershipResult", OLD_MEMBERSHIP_RESULT_FQN)) {
191:             method.getParameter(1).setType(NEW_MEMBERSHIP_RESULT_FQN);
192:             return true;
193:         }
194:         return false;
195:     }
196: 
197:     private static boolean ensureFileCallbackExists(ObjectCreationExpr expr) {
198:         if (expr.getAnonymousClassBody().isEmpty()) {
199:             return false;
200:         }
201: 
202:         boolean isSubscribeCallback =
203:             SUBSCRIBE_CALLBACK_FQN.equals(expr.getType().asString())
204:                 || SUBSCRIBE_CALLBACK_SIMPLE.equals(expr.getType().getNameAsString());
205:         if (!isSubscribeCallback) {
206:             return false;
207:         }
208: 
209:         NodeList<BodyDeclaration<?>> body = expr.getAnonymousClassBody().get();
210:         boolean alreadyHasFile =
211:             body.stream()
212:                 .filter(MethodDeclaration.class::isInstance)
213:                 .map(MethodDeclaration.class::cast)
214:                 .anyMatch(m -> m.getNameAsString().equals("file") && m.getParameters().size() == 2 && matchesType(m.getParameter(1).getType().asString(), "PNFileEventResult", FILE_RESULT_FQN));
215:         if (alreadyHasFile) {
216:             return false;
217:         }
218: 
219:         NodeList<BodyDeclaration<?>> updatedBody = new NodeList<>();
220:         updatedBody.addAll(body);
221:         updatedBody.add(
222:             StaticJavaParser.parseBodyDeclaration(
223:                 "@Override public void file(" + PUBNUB_FQN + " pubnub, " + FILE_RESULT_FQN + " pnFileEventResult) {}"));
224:         expr.setAnonymousClassBody(updatedBody);
225:         return true;
226:     }
227: 
228:     private static boolean ensureFileCallbackExists(ClassOrInterfaceDeclaration declaration) {
229:         boolean extendsSubscribeCallback =
230:             declaration.getExtendedTypes().stream()
231:                 .anyMatch(type -> SUBSCRIBE_CALLBACK_FQN.equals(type.getNameAsString()) || SUBSCRIBE_CALLBACK_FQN.equals(type.asString()));
232:         if (!extendsSubscribeCallback && !declaration.getImplementedTypes().stream()
233:             .anyMatch(type -> SUBSCRIBE_CALLBACK_FQN.equals(type.getNameAsString()) || SUBSCRIBE_CALLBACK_FQN.equals(type.asString()))) {
234:             return false;
235:         }
236: 
237:         boolean alreadyHasFile =
238:             declaration.getMethodsByName("file").stream()
239:                 .anyMatch(m -> m.getParameters().size() == 2 && matchesType(m.getParameter(1).getType().asString(), "PNFileEventResult", FILE_RESULT_FQN));
240:         if (alreadyHasFile) {
241:             return false;
242:         }
243: 
244:         String fileMethod =
245:             "@Override public void file(" + PUBNUB_FQN + " pubnub, " + FILE_RESULT_FQN + " pnFileEventResult) {}";
246:         MethodDeclaration method = StaticJavaParser.parseBodyDeclaration(fileMethod).asMethodDeclaration();
247:         declaration.addMember(method);
248:         return true;
249:     }
250: 
251:     private static boolean matchesType(String actual, String simpleName, String fqn) {
252:         return simpleName.equals(actual) || fqn.equals(actual) || actual.endsWith("." + simpleName);
253:     }
254: }
